title: Update NumericalEarth Slack link in README

body:
This PR modifies the function `rotation_angle` to output the angle `θ` in radians instead of degrees. It also modifies method definitions of `intrinsic_vector` and `extrinsic_vector` for `OrthogonalSphericalShellGrid`, since these use rotation_angle as a helper, and modifies the unit test for rotation_angles to use angles in radians.

This PR is made as a response to this issue: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/issues/749

In some contexts these functions can be called within GPU/Reactant kernels. Currently they rely on the functions `sind`, `cosd`, and `atand` which do not work in GPU kernels. By switching to radians we bypass that problem.

labels.description: Concerning a change which breaks the API
labels.name: breaking change :broken_heart:

title: Changing rotation_angle to output in radians instead of degrees

body:
## Description

Converts the deleted MWE into a formal test case in `test/test_hydrostatic_free_surface_models.jl` to validate the `PrescribedFreeSurface` functionality with `PrescribedVelocityFields` and `ZStarVerticalCoordinate`.

## Changes

- Added imports for `PrescribedFreeSurface` and `MutableVerticalDiscretization`
- Created new testset validating:
  - Model construction with `PrescribedFreeSurface` + `PrescribedVelocityFields` + ZStar grid
  - Correct σ scaling factor updates during time stepping
  - Expected σ values after free surface oscillation (η = A·sin(2πt))

The test verifies grid vertical coordinates evolve correctly with prescribed velocities and free surface displacement, ensuring vertical velocity computation (which depends on horizontal divergence and free surface) is accurate.

## Example

```julia
# Test validates this workflow
η_prescribed(x, y, z, t) = A * sin(2π * t)
free_surface = PrescribedFreeSurface(displacement=η_prescribed)
velocities = PrescribedVelocityFields(; u=u_prescribed, v=v_prescribed)

model = HydrostaticFreeSurfaceModel(grid; velocities, free_surface)
# σ correctly tracks (H + η(t)) / H throughout simulation
```

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->

title: Add test for PrescribedFreeSurface with PrescribedVelocityFields and ZStar
